input.headline: Princess of Wales says her children were 'very sad' to miss Paddington at Royal Variety show

raw.headline: Princess of Wales says her children were 'very sad' to miss Paddington at Royal Variety show

winner: Why did Paddington Bear decline the invitation to the royal variety show? He heard that the children of the princess were going to bear-ly attend.

candidates.text: Why did Paddington Bear bring tissues to the Royal Variety Show? Because he heard that the Princess of Wales was going to tell a sad story about missing him.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks specificity and misses the emotional nuance of the original news. It's a mild pun but not particularly surprising or funny."}

candidates.text: Why was Paddington Bear so disappointed at the Royal Variety Show? Because he missed meeting his royal cubs!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks clarity and specificity. The reference to 'royal cubs' is vague and may not be immediately understood as a play on 'children.' It's mildly funny but could be more precise and surprising."}

candidates.text: Why didn't Paddington bear attend the Royal Variety show? Because he heard the Princess of Wales said her children were "very sad" about missing him!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the wordplay on 'bear' and 'sad,' but it's a bit forced and relies heavily on the specific context of the headline without adding much original humor."}

candidates.text: Why did Paddington Bear decline the invitation to the royal variety show? He heard that the children of the princess were going to bear-ly attend.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat clever with the pun on 'bear-ly attend,' but it's a bit forced and lacks the specificity and surprise that would make it more impactful in the context of the headline."}

candidates.text: The princess of Wales remarked, "It was a rather bearable experience missing Paddington, but our children were utterly crushed.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke plays on the word 'bearable' and 'crushed,' which are somewhat clever, but the humor is mild and relies heavily on a pun that may not land strongly for all audiences. It's specific to the context but lacks broader surprise or punch."}
